meaning: n.节日,祝贺,特别娱乐 a:节日的,快乐的,庆祝的
examples: The gala evening was attended by royalty and politicians.
The festival will climax on Sunday with a gala concert.
People like watching the Spring Festival Gala.
On Wednesday, Crosby, Stills and Nash performed with the jazz orchestra at a private gala.
But there are no gala fundraising dinners that cost more money than they raise.
